CustomField.description: The Jira ID that this case is synced to. It is a numerical value for the Jira ID and is used in the sync. . Source ATEAM 1940
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Jira ID that this case is synced to. It is a numerical value for the Jira ID and is used in the sync. . Source ATEAM 1940
CustomField.label: JiraSyncId
